title_zh: 我们在谷歌I/O 2026上宣布的100件事

summary_zh: 今年在谷歌I/O 2026大会上，我们宣布了Gemini Omni、谷歌反重力、通用购物车等众多创新。以下是主要亮点。
summary_en: At Google I/O 2026 this year, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart, and many more exciting innovations. Here are the highlights.
why_it_matters_zh: 这些重大发布体现了谷歌在人工智能和技术创新领域的领先地位，展示了未来技术的发展方向。
why_it_matters_en: These major announcements demonstrate Google's leadership in AI and technological innovation, showcasing the future direction of technology.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: 100 Things We Announced at Google I/O 2026. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 谷歌Beam的新实验提升团体会议体验

summary_en: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.

image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: A New Experiment Brings Better Group Meetings to Google Beam. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 立场: 开发数据探针以从根本上理解数据如何影响大型语言模型性能
title_en: Position: Let's Develop Data Probes to Fundamentally Understand How Data Affects LLM Performance
summary_zh: 数据是大型语言模型（LLM）的基础，但目前尚不清楚哪些数据在LLM工作流程的不同阶段（如训练、调优、对齐、上下文学习等）中有用，以及原因。当前方法依赖大量公开数据集的实验获取经验启发，计算资源消耗大且缺乏理论本质理解。本文主张开发系统方法，利用合成序列（称为数据探针）通过随机过程生成，帮助揭示数据特性如何驱动LLM行为。通过对数据探针的观察，研究者可以系统研究数据特性对模型性能、泛化和鲁棒性的影响，借助理论概念如典型集为LLM行为提供解释。这种方法为理解数据在LLM训练和推理中的作用提供基础性见解，超越经验启发。
summary_en: Data is fundamental to large language models (LLMs), yet what makes certain data useful at different LLM workflow stages (training, tuning, alignment, in-context learning) and why remains unclear. Current approaches rely on extensive experiments with large public datasets to derive empirical heuristics, which are computationally heavy and lack principled understanding. This position paper proposes developing systematic methods to generate synthetic sequences, called data probes, from defined random processes to reveal meaningful characteristics when used in LLM workflows. Observing LLM behavior on these probes allows researchers to study how data traits influence performance, generalization, and robustness using theoretical concepts like typical sets. The data probe approach offers foundational insights into data's role in LLM training and inference beyond empirical heuristics.
why_it_matters_zh: 理解数据如何影响LLM性能对于设计更有效的数据筛选和训练方法至关重要。开发数据探针能系统揭示数据特性的本质，推动理论研究和实践优化，减少对大量实验的依赖，提升模型性能和稳定性。
why_it_matters_en: Understanding how data affects LLM performance is crucial for designing better data selection and training strategies. Developing data probes systematically reveals the essence of data characteristics, advancing theoretical research and practical optimization, reducing dependence on extensive experiments, and improving model performance and robustness.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Position: Let's Develop Data Probes to Fundamentally Understand How Data Affects LLM Performance. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 文档AI实操：用于OCR与大型语言模型管道的微服务架构
title_en: Operationalizing Document AI: A Microservice Architecture for OCR and LLM Pipelines in Production
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种微服务架构，将分类、光学字符识别（OCR）和大型语言模型结构化字段提取等多模型管道封装在一起，支持每小时处理上千份多页文档。文章详细探讨了设计决策，包括混合分类、GPU推理与CPU协调分离、异步处理IO操作及横向独立扩展策略。批量性能分析揭示关键发现：终端延迟主要由OCR主导，系统瓶颈源自共享GPU推理能力而非工作线程数。旨在为实践者提供可行架构模式，助力文档理解系统在生产环境中的有效运行。
summary_en: This paper presents a microservice architecture encapsulating pipelines of multiple models for classification, optical character recognition (OCR), and large language model structured field extraction, capable of processing thousands of multi-page documents per hour. Key design decisions include hybrid classification, separation of GPU-bound inference from CPU-bound orchestration, asynchronous processing of IO-bound operations, and independent horizontal scaling. Batch profiling reveals that OCR dominates end-to-end latency rather than language model parsing, and system saturation depends on shared GPU inference capacity instead of worker count. The goal is to provide practitioners with concrete architectural patterns for deploying document understanding systems effectively in production.
why_it_matters_zh: 该架构架起了学术模型定义与大规模生产实践之间的桥梁，特别针对多模型联合应用的性能瓶颈给出解决方案，推动文档AI技术的工业落地。
why_it_matters_en: This architecture bridges the gap between academic model definitions and large-scale production, addressing performance bottlenecks in multi-model pipelines and advancing industrial deployment of document AI technologies.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Operationalizing Document AI: A Microservice Architecture for OCR and LLM Pipelines in Production. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 评估个人健康记录在个性化健康人工智能中的效用
title_en: Evaluating the Utility of Personal Health Records in Personalized Health AI
summary_zh: 本研究评估了大型语言模型（如Gemini 3.0 Flash）在利用患者管理的个人健康记录（PHRs）数据回答健康查询中的表现。通过分析2257条来自不同患者提问场景的查询，并结合1945份匿名PHRs，研究对比了无PHR上下文、仅基本摘要及完整临床记录三种条件下的回答效果。结果显示，使用PHR数据显著提升了答案的有用性、安全性、准确性、相关性和个性化，揭示了模型在时间顺序理解及罕见信息生成方面的不足。研究提出了一套新的评估框架，推动未来更好利用个人健康记录促进用户理解自身健康。
summary_en: This study assesses the performance of large language models (LLMs) like Gemini 3.0 Flash in answering health queries using patient-managed Personal Health Records (PHRs). By analyzing 2,257 queries from various patient contexts matched with 1,945 de-identified PHRs, responses were generated under three conditions: without PHR context, with basic summaries, and with full clinical notes. Results demonstrated significant improvements in the helpfulness, safety, accuracy, relevance, and personalization of answers when PHR data was included. The study also identified limitations in LLMs related to temporal understanding and rare confabulations, proposing a novel evaluation framework to monitor these gaps. This work supports further exploration of using PHRs to enhance patient understanding of their own health.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究为个人健康记录结合人工智能提供了实证基础，显示通过PHR上下文能有效提升健康问答的质量和安全性，帮助患者更好理解自身健康状况。同时，提出的评估框架有助于发现并纠正AI回答中的盲点，推动个性化健康AI的发展。
why_it_matters_en: The study provides empirical evidence supporting the integration of Personal Health Records with AI to significantly improve the quality and safety of health-related question answering, thereby aiding patients in better understanding their health. Additionally, the proposed evaluation framework helps identify and address AI limitations, advancing personalized health AI capabilities.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Evaluating the Utility of Personal Health Records in Personalized Health AI. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 闪亮的故事，隐秘的挣扎：通过大型语言模型视角调查残疾人形象
title_en: Shiny Stories, Hidden Struggles: Investigating the Representation of Disability Through the Lens of LLMs
summary_zh: 现代大型语言模型(LLMs)因能模拟人类行为和生成反映不同人群和身份的文本而备受关注。然而，这些模型可能放大偏见或歧视，或因去偏见而过度理想化残疾人形象，忽视其真实复杂的生活。本文通过模拟残疾人视角生成社交媒体帖子，并与真实残疾人帖子比较，发现LLMs常理想化残疾经历，过于正面且不真实；同时，残疾人相关主题如职业和娱乐较少出现，强化了排斥性叙述。研究指出LLMs难以真实反映边缘群体复杂经验，需批判性审视其表现。
summary_en: Modern large language models (LLMs) attract attention for simulating human behavior and demographic personas, but they can perpetuate biases or overcorrect by idealizing marginalized groups. This study examines disability representation by generating social media posts simulating disabled individuals and comparing them with real posts. Findings show LLMs often portray overly positive, unrealistic stereotypes of disability and associate key life topics like career and entertainment more with nondisabled individuals, reinforcing exclusionary narratives. The paper highlights the challenge for LLMs to capture the nuanced realities of marginalized communities and stresses the importance of critical evaluation of their representations.
why_it_matters_zh: 这项研究揭示了大型语言模型在表现残疾人群时存在的潜在偏差与过度理想化问题，提醒我们关注技术可能加剧的社会偏见，同时呼吁对模型生成内容进行批判性审视，确保对边缘群体的公正和真实呈现。
why_it_matters_en: This research exposes how large language models may perpetuate biases and overidealize disability experiences, underscoring the risk of reinforcing exclusionary narratives. It calls for critical scrutiny of AI-generated content to ensure fair and authentic representation of marginalized communities, promoting more inclusive AI applications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Shiny Stories, Hidden Struggles: Investigating the Representation of Disability Through the Lens of LLMs. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 利用大型语言模型进行情感分析：Decentraland的MANA代币多模态分析
title_en: Leveraging Large Language Models for Sentiment Analysis: Multi-Modal Analysis of Decentraland's MANA Token
summary_zh: 本文研究了Decentraland虚拟现实平台的社区情感与多模态金融数据结合，用于提升虚拟世界经济中加密货币价格预测的准确性。通过BERT模型进行Discord社区情感分析，并基于LSTM构建融合历史价格、情感评分、交易量和市值的多模态预测模型。结果显示，社区情感以中性为主带正向偏斜，多模态模型在预测效果上显著优于仅用价格的基线模型，证明了社区信号在虚拟经济预测中的价值。
summary_en: This study explores integrating sentiment from Decentraland's Discord community with multi-modal financial data to improve cryptocurrency price prediction in virtual world economies. Using a BERT-based model for sentiment analysis and LSTM architectures that incorporate historical prices, sentiment scores, trading volume, and market capitalization, results show predominantly neutral sentiment with positive bias. The multi-modal model significantly outperforms a price-only baseline, demonstrating the predictive value of community-derived signals for virtual economy forecasting.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究结合了自然语言处理和多模态金融数据，创新性地提升了虚拟经济中代币价格预测的准确性，有助于推动沉浸式虚拟环境和加密市场分析领域的发展。
why_it_matters_en: The research innovatively combines NLP and multi-modal financial data to enhance token price prediction accuracy in virtual economies, advancing the fields of immersive virtual environments and cryptocurrency market analysis.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Leveraging Large Language Models for Sentiment Analysis: Multi-Modal Analysis of Decentraland's MANA Token. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 通过代理链式思维调优实现长上下文推理
title_en: Long-Context Reasoning Through Proxy-Based Chain-of-Thought Tuning
summary_zh: 近期大型语言模型支持高达一千万标记的输入，但在需要复杂推理的长上下文任务中表现不佳。研究提出代理上下文的概念，即利用输入的部分内容替代完整序列解决问题。不同上下文下模型推理性能差异显著。为提升长上下文推理能力，提出ProxyCoT框架，通过强化学习或蒸馏获得高质量代理上下文推理链，并结合完整上下文进行有监督微调。多数据集实验显示ProxyCoT在降低计算成本的同时优于强基线，且具备跨领域泛化能力。
summary_en: Recent large language models can handle inputs up to 10 million tokens but struggle with complex reasoning in long-context tasks. A proxy context—a subset of the full input—can suffice for solving such tasks. Models show large performance gaps between proxy and full contexts. To enhance long-context reasoning, ProxyCoT is proposed: it first learns chain-of-thought reasoning on proxy contexts via reinforcement learning or distillation, then grounds those traces with supervised fine-tuning on full contexts. Experiments demonstrate ProxyCoT outperforms strong baselines with less computational overhead and generalizes well to out-of-domain tasks.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究解决了大型语言模型在长上下文任务中的推理性能瓶颈，利用代理上下文高效训练推理链，从而提升模型在大规模输入上的复杂推理能力并降低计算量，推动长文本理解的发展。
why_it_matters_en: This work addresses the bottleneck of reasoning performance in large language models on long-context tasks by leveraging proxy contexts to efficiently train chain-of-thought reasoning. It improves complex reasoning on massive inputs while reducing computational cost, advancing long-text understanding capabilities.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Long-Context Reasoning Through Proxy-Based Chain-of-Thought Tuning. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI模型推翻离散几何中的核心猜想
title_en: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
summary_zh: OpenAI模型解决了存在80年的单位距离问题，推翻了离散几何中的一项重大猜想，标志着AI驱动数学的里程碑。
summary_en: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一成果展示了人工智能在解决长期未解数学难题中的潜力，推动了数学研究的自动化和革新。
why_it_matters_en: This achievement demonstrates the potential of AI in tackling longstanding mathematical problems, advancing automation and innovation in mathematical research.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

why_it_matters_en: This phase means AI will be more broadly used in global education, helping enhance educational quality and equity.

summary_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1发布，提供了一系列更高效的地球观测模型，旨在提升遥感数据处理和分析的效率。
summary_en: OlmoEarth v1.1 has been released, introducing a family of more efficient Earth observation models designed to enhance the processing and analysis of remote sensing data.

title_zh: PaddleOCR 3.5：使用变换器后端执行OCR和文档解析任务
title_en: PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend
summary_zh: PaddleOCR 3.5最新版本引入了使用变换器模型作为后端，提升了OCR文本识别和文档解析的效率与准确性，方便开发者在多种应用场景中实现自动化文字处理。
summary_en: PaddleOCR 3.5 introduces a new version that uses transformer models as the backend to improve the efficiency and accuracy of OCR text recognition and document parsing, enabling developers to automate text processing across various applications.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着文本识别和文档解析需求不断增长，采用先进的变换器模型能够显著提升OCR工具的性能，满足复杂场景下的文字识别需求。
why_it_matters_en: As demands for text recognition and document parsing grow, leveraging advanced transformer models significantly enhances OCR tool performance, meeting text recognition needs in complex scenarios.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
